Metadata.title: Shenzhen Robot Valley | Shenzhen Robot Valley Showroom
Metadata.description: Learn about the Shenzhen Robot Valley showroom experience, industry ecosystem, and visit application.

Landing.title: Shenzhen Robot Valley
Landing.description: Anchored at Nanshan Zhigu Industrial Park, Shenzhen Robot Valley is an open showcase for robotics exhibitions, technology experiences, industry exchange, and innovation collaboration in Shenzhen.
Landing.metricsLabel: Nanshan area indicators within the broader Robot Valley ecosystem

showroom.title: Visit the Shenzhen Robot Valley Showroom
showroom.description: The showroom presents embodied intelligence, service robots, industrial automation, core components, and interactive demos so visitors can understand Shenzhen Robot Valley through real scenes and technology showcases.

detail.title: A robotics showcase and innovation platform centered on Nanshan Zhigu Industrial Park
detail.description: Shenzhen Robot Valley focuses on frontier robotics showcases, application-scenario experiences, industry resource connection, and innovation exchange. Visitors can explore robot bodies, intelligent manufacturing, AI algorithms, core components, and service robot applications while seeing Shenzhen's robotics ecosystem in context.

showroom.title: Immersive Showroom Experience
showroom.description: Physical robots, interactive demos, and scenario-based displays show the full path from robotics R&D to real-world application. The showroom spans over 2,000 sqm, showcasing cutting-edge achievements in embodied intelligence, industrial automation, service robots, and core components, giving every visitor a close-up experience of real robotics capabilities.

ecosystem.title: Industry Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: The platform connects Nanshan research institutions, robotics companies, application scenarios, and industry services into an efficient collaboration network. Over 200 robotics enterprises cluster here, with 90% of components available within a 3km radius, forming a complete industry chain from core components to system integration.

visit.title: Built for Visitors
visit.description: Designed for government parks, enterprise clients, investors, research teams, and industry partners to visit and connect. We customize tour routes and briefing priorities based on each visitor background, offering one-stop reception services including showroom tours, technical demonstrations, industry discussions, and project matchmaking, making every visit efficient and valuable.

Landing.whyTitle: A concentrated robotics innovation hub for R&D, companies, and real-world applications
Landing.whyDescription: Robot Valley brings together Nanshan's university research, leading robotics companies, application scenarios, capital networks, and Greater Bay Area supply chain resources. The map remains available as supporting context for understanding the Nanshan enterprise ecosystem.

whyItems.innovation: Xili, Liuxiandong, Science Park, and nearby innovation zones form a dense technology network.
whyItems.cluster: Robot makers, AI software, core component, and intelligent manufacturing companies continue to cluster in Nanshan.
whyItems.bayArea: Greater Bay Area supply chains, capital, and application scenarios help robotics companies collaborate across the region.

Landing.datasetDescription: The following company cards show Nanshan area robotics enterprises as secondary ecosystem context for Shenzhen Robot Valley.

Sidebar.title: Nanshan Area Enterprises
Sidebar.subtitle: Explore Nanshan area robotics enterprises as supporting ecosystem data around Shenzhen Robot Valley.

VisitApplication.title: Apply to Visit Shenzhen Robot Valley
VisitApplication.successMessage: Your visit request has been received. We will contact you soon.

ApplyPage.title: Apply to Visit Shenzhen Robot Valley
ApplyPage.description: Please submit your visit request below. Our team will review your preferred date, visitor count, and organization information, then contact you soon.

ApplicationForm.successMessage: Your visit request has been received. We will contact you soon.

errors.generic: Submission failed. Please try again later.
errors.network: Network request failed. Please check your connection and try again.

ShowroomPage.title: A focused showroom for robotics technology, scenes, and industry exchange
ShowroomPage.description: The Shenzhen Robot Valley showroom turns robotics capability into a clear visit experience: physical products, interactive demonstrations, ecosystem briefings, and scenario displays for teams that need to understand the platform quickly.

what.title: Industry connections driven by showcase experiences
what.description: The Shenzhen Robot Valley showroom turns robotics capability into a clear visit experience. Physical products, interactive demonstrations, ecosystem briefings, and scenario displays help visiting teams quickly understand the platform value and technology landscape.

see.title: From core technologies to real-world applications
see.description: The showroom presents embodied intelligence, service robots, industrial automation, core components, and AI systems. Every exhibit is organized around real application scenarios, making technical capabilities tangible through live demonstrations.

audience.title: Tailored visit experiences for diverse audiences
audience.description: Designed for government delegations, enterprise clients, investors, research teams, media visitors, and industry partners. We customize tour routes and briefing priorities based on each group background, making every visit efficient and valuable.

collaboration.title: Building a robotics industry collaboration ecosystem
collaboration.description: Leveraging the industrial cluster advantages of Shenzhen Robot Valley, we provide partners with comprehensive support including technology matchmaking, project incubation, and market expansion to jointly advance robotics innovation and industrialization.

detailFoundation.title: Industrial Foundation
detailFoundation.text: More than 200 robotics enterprises cluster here, with 90% of components able to assemble quickly within 3 kilometers, supporting a full loop from R&D and manufacturing to application.

detailInnovation.title: Innovation Ecosystem
detailInnovation.text: Ecological platforms such as Model Camp, the Greater Bay Area's first AI community, and the Guangdong Embodied AI Robotics Innovation Center are rooted here.

VisitPage.title: Plan a clear and efficient Shenzhen Robot Valley visit
VisitPage.description: Find out how to book a visit, which teams the showroom is designed for, and what information helps staff confirm your arrangement faster.

request.title: Submit Application
request.text: Fill in your organization, contact person, preferred visit date, number of visitors, and areas of interest.

confirm.title: Confirm Arrangement
confirm.text: Staff will review your application, confirm availability, and discuss visit timing, team size, and priorities.

visit.title: On-site Visit
visit.text: Your team can tour the showroom, view demonstrations, and connect with relevant industry or project resources as needed.

prepare.title: Before Your Visit
prepare.text: We recommend that visiting teams learn about Shenzhen Robot Valley basics in advance and prepare specific technology directions or collaboration needs, so staff can tailor the visit more effectively.

PartnersPage.title: Professional reception and deep connections for partners
PartnersPage.description: Shenzhen Robot Valley provides customized reception programs for government parks, enterprise clients, investors, and industry partners, including showroom tours, industry briefings, project roadshows, and technology matchmaking.

reception.label: Government Reception
reception.value: Park inspections, industry roundtables, policy communication

enterprise.label: Enterprise Matchmaking
enterprise.value: Technical exchange, supply chain collaboration, joint R&D

project.label: Project Roadshows
project.value: Investment matchmaking, project showcasing, resource matching

exchange.label: Industry Exchange
exchange.value: Summits, forums, technical seminars, international cooperation

reception.title: Standard Reception
reception.text: Showroom tour + industry briefing, ideal for first-time government and enterprise delegations.

showcase.title: In-depth Showcase
showcase.text: Customized display + technical demo, for visiting teams with clear collaboration directions.

matchmaking.title: Precision Matchmaking
matchmaking.text: Project roadshow + one-on-one meetings, for enterprises seeking investment or supply chain collaboration.

PartnersPage.flowDescription: Every step, from requirements communication to follow-up, is carefully designed to ensure quality reception outcomes.

brief.title: Requirements Communication
brief.text: Visiting parties submit background and collaboration needs; staff evaluate and design the program.

plan.title: Program Design
plan.text: Customize tour routes, briefing priorities, and participants based on visitor background.

host.title: On-site Reception
host.text: Showroom tour, technical demonstrations, discussions — accompanied and facilitated throughout.

cta.title: Request Partner Reception
cta.text: Please submit your reception requirements through the visit application system. Staff will contact you within 2 working days.

FoundationPage.title: A Peak Formed by Industry Clustering
FoundationPage.description: Shenzhen Robot Valley brings together more than 200 robotics enterprises, forming a complete industry chain from core components to application scenarios.
FoundationPage.detailText: More than 200 robotics enterprises cluster here, with 90% of components able to assemble quickly within 3 kilometers, supporting a full loop from R&D and manufacturing to application.

chain.title: Complete Industry Chain Layout
chain.description: From foundational core components to end-use application scenarios, Shenzhen Robot Valley has formed a complete robotics industry chain with significant synergy across all segments.

items.title: Core Components
items.description: Servo motors, reducers, controllers, sensors, AI chips, and other key component enterprises cluster here, providing solid foundational support for robot R&D.

items.title: Robot Manufacturing
items.description: Covering industrial robots, service robots, specialized robots, humanoid robots, and more to meet automation needs across diverse industries and scenarios.

items.title: System Integration
items.description: System integrators in production line automation, smart warehousing and logistics, machine vision inspection, and flexible manufacturing precisely match technology with industry demand.

items.title: Application Scenarios
items.description: Covering 3C electronics, new energy vehicles, medical devices, smart logistics, commercial services, and more, continuously expanding the boundaries of robotics applications.

supply.title: 3km Supply Chain Radius
supply.description: Within a 3km radius of Shenzhen Robot Valley, enterprises can rapidly complete the entire process from core component procurement to robot assembly and testing. 90% of components are available locally, significantly shortening R&D cycles and delivery times, creating a hard-to-replicate industrial cluster advantage.

ecosystem.title: Diverse Enterprise Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: Shenzhen Robot Valley brings together a multi-tier enterprise community from startups to listed companies, covering industrial robots, service robots, specialized robots, core components, AI software, and system integration, forming an ecosystem where large, medium, and small enterprises grow together.

InnovationPage.title: Continuous Surge of Innovation
InnovationPage.description: AI communities, provincial innovation centers, and university-industry collaboration continue to drive technological breakthroughs within the corridor.
InnovationPage.detailText: Ecological platforms such as Model Camp, the Greater Bay Area's first AI community, and the Guangdong Embodied AI Robotics Innovation Center are rooted here.

platforms.title: Key Innovation Platforms
platforms.description: Multiple national and provincial innovation platforms are rooted in Shenzhen Robot Valley, providing enterprises with technology R&D, testing, validation, and commercialization support.

items.title: Model Camp AI Community
items.description: The Greater Bay Area's first AI-themed industry community, gathering startups in embodied intelligence, foundation models, and robotics with access to computing power, scenarios, and capital.

items.title: Guangdong Embodied AI Robotics Innovation Center
items.description: A provincial innovation platform focused on core embodied intelligence technologies, driving the R&D and industrialization of humanoid robot systems and key components.

items.title: Xili Lake International Science and Education City
items.description: Home to research institutes from Tsinghua, Peking University, HIT and more, forming a complete innovation chain from fundamental research to applied development.

research.title: Frontier Technology Directions
research.description: The innovation strength of Shenzhen Robot Valley is concentrated in these key areas, continuously driving generational advances in robotics technology.

items.label: Embodied Intelligence
items.value: Multimodal perception, autonomous decision-making, dexterous manipulation

items.label: Humanoid Robots
items.value: Bipedal locomotion, whole-body control, human-robot interaction

items.label: AI Foundation Models
items.value: Robot foundation models, task planning, scene understanding

items.label: Core Components
items.value: High-performance servos, precision reducers, force sensors

items.label: Collaborative Robots
items.value: Safe interaction, flexible manufacturing, easy deployment

items.label: Swarm Intelligence
items.value: Multi-robot coordination, distributed control, fleet scheduling

CollaborationPage.title: Industry-Academia-Research-Finance Synergy
CollaborationPage.description: Universities, roadshow platforms, and large-scale financing plans jointly build an efficient collaboration system for showcase, exchange, and project matchmaking.
CollaborationPage.detailText: The Xili Lake International Science and Education City, X-DAY Xili Lake Roadshow Club, and the 100-billion-yuan financing plan jointly build a highly effective collaboration system.

models.title: Five Collaboration Models
models.description: Shenzhen Robot Valley connects the full chain from technology R&D to market deployment through multi-tier collaboration mechanisms.

items.title: Industry-Academia-Research
items.description: Universities and enterprises jointly tackle challenges, conducting targeted R&D aligned with industry needs and accelerating technology transfer from lab to production line.

items.title: Investment & Financing
items.description: X-DAY Xili Lake Roadshow Club hosts regular pitch events connecting angel investors, VCs, and industrial capital, with a 100-billion-yuan financing plan providing sustained support.

items.title: Showcase & Exchange
items.description: The Robot Valley showroom and industry summits provide product display and networking platforms, fostering upstream-downstream collaboration.

items.title: Project Incubation
items.description: Providing startups with office space, technical support, and industry resource connections, lowering barriers to entry and accelerating product commercialization.

items.title: International Cooperation
items.description: Connecting global robotics industry resources to drive cross-border technology transfer, market expansion, and mutual recognition of standards.

partners.title: Partner Ecosystem
partners.description: Shenzhen Robot Valley has established deep partnerships with the following types of organizations to jointly advance the robotics industry.

items.label: Government & Parks
items.value: Policy support, space capacity, project attraction

items.label: Universities & Institutes
items.value: Technology R&D, talent cultivation, joint labs

items.label: Investment Institutions
items.value: Full-stage coverage: angel, VC, PE, industry funds

items.label: Leading Enterprises
items.value: Scenario sharing, supply chain synergy, joint innovation

items.label: Industry Associations
items.value: Standard setting, industry networking, policy advocacy

items.label: Service Providers
items.value: IP protection, testing & certification, legal advisory

ApplySuccessPage.title: Your visit application has been submitted
ApplySuccessPage.description: Our staff will review your application and contact you within 2 working days. For urgent requests or questions, please reach out by phone or email.
